patch:
Index: backend/app.py
===================================================================
--- backend/app.py	
+++ backend/app.py	
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+from flask import Flask, send_from_directory, render_template
+import os
+
+app = Flask(__name__)
+
+INSTALLERS_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)), '..', 'installers')
+
+@app.route('/')
+def index():
+    files = []
+    if os.path.exists(INSTALLERS_DIR):
+        files = [f for f in os.listdir(INSTALLERS_DIR) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(INSTALLERS_DIR, f))]
+    return render_template('index.html', files=files)
+
+@app.route('/download/<filename>')
+def download(filename):
+    return send_from_directory(INSTALLERS_DIR, filename, as_attachment=True)
+
+if __name__ == '__main__':
+    os.makedirs(INSTALLERS_DIR, exist_ok=True)
+    app.run(debug=True, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000)
